message:
fix(clippy): resolve 30+ clippy warnings across source and test files

Key fixes:
- session_index: Box large enum variant, eliminate redundant clones by
  recovering update from SendError, add needless_pass_by_value allow
- compaction_worker: move run_compaction_thread before test module,
  use checked_sub for Instant arithmetic
- session: const fn for test helpers, use and_then for option chains,
  typed u64 literals to avoid cast_sign_loss
- extensions: add allow attrs for too_many_arguments/too_many_lines,
  const fn for pure match, type alias for complex Arc<Mutex<Vec>>,
  early drop for significant_drop_tightening
- Test fixes: map_or for map().unwrap_or(), writeln for write with \n,
  literal_string_with_formatting_args allows for bash scripts,
  case-insensitive file extension comparison

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
